utility_evaluation.REASONING:

2. travel_dates – specific dates '2024-08-01 to 2024-08-05' ✔️ 
3. transportation – flight details with airline name, class, price per person, total cost, and currency ✔️ 
4. accommodation – includes property name, star rating, guest rating, price per night, total cost, and currency ✔️ 
5. activities – includes activity name, type, price per person, total cost, and currency ✔️ 
6. additional_services – includes restaurant name, dietary accommodations, price per person, total cost, and currency ✔️ 
7. total_budget – includes total amount and currency ✔️ 
All items are present and fully specified.
